feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to migrate data with CDS view behaviour LTMOM
entry.content:
Hello,

can someone please explain to me how I can migrate data with CDS view behaviours? I can't find anything online for this topic. I created an migrationobject over LTMOM and chose A_BANK_3 as CDS view behaviour. I've created a short sourcestructure with only the keyfields and mapped to the A_BANK_3 view for testing. I did download the template file and filled some testing values. But now i'm stuck. Whats the next step? How can I simulate data? Maybe somone could give me a step by step guide on how to use this method correctly. Thank you very much.

 

Greetings Alex

entry.title: Migration Question.
entry.content: While learning Migration of Data from migration cockpit tutorial on S/4HANA public cloud, In Bank object there is no International Address version sheet, but when I am practicing it on tenant, it is showing me International Address version sheet, in this Sheet what do I write in Version ID.

entry.title: SAP APO MIGRATE
entry.content:
Olá, estamos carregando dados no sistema S4HANA. Não conseguimos identificar nenhuma solução BAPI/iDOC/RDM ou Migration Cockpit para os objetos APO abaixo. Não queremos usar a gravação LSMW.

Alguém sabe qual iDOC/BAPI pode ser usado para carregar esses objetos em massa? Códigos de transação são escritos ao lado do objeto.

  1. Produto Master /SAPAPO/MAT1 - Dados Mestre -> Produto
  2. Faixa de Transporte /SAPAPO/SCC_TL1 - Faixas de Transporte
  3. Calendários /SAPAPO/CALENDAR – Calendário. Vejo LOICAL01 iDOC para isso, mas queria confirmar.

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Edition / Error while dowloading XML Template in the Migrationcockpit
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
im new to the topic of Data Migration and used this sap course (https://learning.sap.com/courses/migrating-data-to-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition) to get startet. My Problem is, that when i want to download the XML Template for the "Customer" Migration Object to fill the tables with data, the file i get contains only the following text/error:

Can someone tell me what the issue might be and if i can fix it ? By the way the download as CSV template option is working. The migration project is configured for stagging tables and Local Database Connection.
We use a TDD System with the SAP Demo data and i didnt create any custom fields or migration objects.

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: Converting Excel File for SAP Upload: automate EWM packaging specification and stock upload in SAP
entry.content:
In the context of SAP master data migration, I developed a VBA-based tool designed to automate the process of converting any Excel file into the correct format for SAP uploads. This tool is currently used for two key use cases: stock migration and packaging specification migration.

Use Case Example: Stock Migration

Consider the scenario where we receive an Excel file containing a customer’s stock data that needs to be migrated into SAP. Unfortunately, we can’t directly upload this file into SAP due to format incompatibility. Without automation, this would involve a time-consuming process of manually copying and pasting each row into the appropriate template.

The Solution: Automating the Process

With my tool, this manual work is eliminated. By simply pressing the “Start Migration” button, the VBA code automatically converts the input file into the correct format required for SAP upload, significantly reducing both time and potential errors.

Below, you can find a summary (non-exhaustive)



Benefits of the Tool

 

  • Automation: No more manual copy-pasting; the tool automates the entire conversion process.
  • Efficiency: The migration process is completed in seconds, not hours.
  • Flexibility: While currently focused on stock and packaging specifications, the tool can be adapted for other data migration needs.

If you’d like to discuss how this tool could help streamline your data migration processes, feel free to reach out. There are no limitations, only solutions! 😉

  EWM - Master Data 

📧h.evrard@cnt-online.com 📱 +32 473 60 82 70 🔗 LinkedIn: Hugo Evrard

entry.title: Custom mapping task LTMOM
entry.content:
Hello,

I have requirements to map some data and show during mapping task in Fiori migration cockpit. I want to know some sample code for this? 

Second I see some rule from sap called Cvt_waers etc and I want to know where I can find the related program for this? I already checked in SE80, SE24, SE37 but I can't find those element

 

Thanks

entry.title: Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations Ownership
entry.content:
Team,
Please let me know which SAP Functional Team [ SAP HCM etc...] or SAP Technical Team should be ROLE OWNER [ Role assignment approver or Role Content Approver] for Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations. Also, please share location of relevant documentation - if available. 

Thanks

Raj

entry.title: bapi_po_change issue in looping when mass deleting the BOM components
entry.content: Hello everyone, I'm having a problem when using the BAPI_PO_CHANGE when deleting the BOM components inside the loop. the first line is deleted but when the second line hits, it says "no data changed". can anybody know what is the problem? I'm stuck on this one.  If there is a solution, may I know how?

entry.title: Data migration from SAP B1 to S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently planning on the Data Migration project to migrate data from SAP Business One(B1) to S4HANA public cloud.

In the below link Migration options between SAP B1 and S4HANA Public Cloud 

@Yong_Yu  mentioned "you can use S/4 Migration Cockpit to migrate legacy data from B1 HANA table to S/4 directly". I have the following questions regarding this statement.

  1. Does the above statement mean to use the Migration cockpit(Fiori App ID: F3473) to download the corresponding master/transaction data Templates, fill the templates and then upload these templates to the cockpit, to complete the migration process ? or any other alternative suggested here ?
  2. If using data templates, I would like to know, whether there are any alternatives available to automate the data transfer from SAP B1 to these templates or are these templates supposed to be filled done manually ?

Thank you!

Regards,
Karthik

entry.title: How to create control parameter external and internal numbering in custom migration object
entry.content:
Hello, 
I've created custom migration object for creating purchase requisition. I want to set control parameter for external/internal number range. How I can set this in migration object?

 

Thanks

Records Not Marked For Deletion Field is " MISSING " - Marked in Yellow in attached screen shot. 

Please advice 

Thanks

entry.title: can only create a project on Dev environment
entry.content:
I've assigned the same role in all the environment and I can only create a project on Dev environment. 

Is it normal?

entry.title: LSMW HOW TO MIGRATE serial Number !
entry.content:
Hey expert, 

i have an issue migrating Serial number using LSMW with BAPI  there is only BUS2017 but its not handling serial number.

any soulution !! 

thank you.

entry.title: I hit error in LSMW "No default name could be found for field 'XAUSZ'."
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I hit error in LSMW in S/4HANA On Premise.

"No default name could be found for field 'XAUSZ'."

Any idea?

I need to update the field but the available template for data migration is missing this account statement field.

Is there any other option I can use to update this field and other field such as consolidated invoicing and classification for buyer issued invoice in S/4HANA OnPrem?

Thank you.

entry.title: How do debug to get current data causing an error during LTMOM simulations?
entry.content:
In LTMOM I run the Simulation as follows:


My objective is to understand what data is causing the following error:

Just putting a watchpoint to message CQCL 008 is not a good option because it will stop only during the final log processing routine.

I'm usually debugging at the break-point before mapping but I haven't found the issue yet:

entry.title: Migration Cockpit internal numbering
entry.content:
Hello all, 

 

I am currently working on a migration project with the migration cockpit. What the customer has right now is internal numbering for all materials on a different system. What he needs is that we migrate the materials to S/4 with different internal numbering. I managed to find out that i can change the numbering from external to internal through the control parameters in the migration cockpit. Still it doesn't work out for me. Anyone has a clue how to fix this?

entry.title: Best Practices for Data Migration in a Carve-Out from S/4HANA On-Prem to S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 

I’m currently working with a customer who is performing a carve-out, moving from their legacy S/4HANA On-Premise system to S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. As part of this project, they are facing challenges in identifying the relevant data tables for migration and pinpointing where exactly the necessary data resides in their existing system. I’d like to reach out to this community for any best practices or lessons learned from similar carve-out scenarios.

  • The new system will be based on S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, so we are focusing on a clean and efficient transition.
  • The legacy system is S/4HANA On-Premise, with years of data accumulated. The customer is unsure about the best approach to identify and extract only the necessary data for migration. 

Challenges:


  1. 1. Identifying relevant tables: The customer is unsure about which tables to migrate and how to locate the key tables in their On-Premise system.
    2. Data relevance: There’s some confusion around how to extract **only the relevant data**, without transferring unnecessary historical data.
    3. Table mapping for migration tools: Aligning On-Prem tables with SAP Migration Cockpit templates and the standard migration objects available for the Cloud edition has also proven to be challenging.

Key Questions:

  • What best practices exist for identifying and mapping the critical tables in S/4HANA On-Prem for a carve-out scenario?
  • Are there any efficient methodologies or tools that can help pinpoint relevant data and ensure it aligns with the S/4HANA Cloud public edition data structure?
  • How do you ensure the customer extracts only the required data, avoiding clutter or excessive historical records? 

I’d appreciate any advice, strategies, or best practices that you have found effective in your own experience—particularly in scenarios where S/4HANA On-Prem is being transitioned to the public Cloud edition. We want to ensure that our data migration is as clean and efficient as possible.

Thanks in advance for your input!

Best regards,
Yannick

entry.title: t178t impact in s/4 hana conversion
entry.content:

I'd like to know how T178T extractor is impacted, during the s/4 hana conversion

entry.title: Transport a project between clients in Migration Cookpit
entry.content:
We need a help, to solve a problem.
We need you tell us the steps, exactly, how to transport a project between clients in Migration Cookpit. 
We need transport the project the client DH0-650  to DH0-550 and DH0-110.

entry.title: Customer Data Migration - From General to Sales and Company
entry.content:
Hello All,
I would like to understand if it is possible to "integrate" already uploaded General Data, where Public Cloud gave back customer progressive number, with Company and Sales Data.

Does it exist a dedicated migration project or App? 

Thanks
S
